footer.brand: AI-powered creative writing platform, turning imagination into stories.

landing.heroSubtitle: AI empowers creativity, turning imagination into stories. Qritor helps you easily create novels, generate comics, and produce animated comics, unleashing unlimited creative potential.

aiWriting.title: AI Writing Assistant
aiWriting.description: A powerful AI assistant understands your creative intent, intelligently continues plots, generates dialogue, and enriches details. Like having a creative partner who understands you, always inspiring.

modular.title: Modular Creation
modular.description: Character profiles, world-building, plot outlines, chapter content - everything organized. Let AI understand your complete creative blueprint, generating more coherent and in-depth content.

workflow.title: Workflow Engine
workflow.description: Define your creative process, let AI execute automatically. From outline generation to chapter splitting, from content creation to format optimization, fully automated, efficiency doubled.

comic.title: Comic Generation
comic.description: Transform your text stories into beautiful comics. AI understands scenes, characters, emotions, automatically generating storyboards and visuals, bringing stories to life.

animation.title: Animated Comics
animation.description: Bring static comics to life! AI adds effects, voiceovers, background music to your comics, creating watchable animated comics reaching wider audiences.

landing.ctaDescription: Register for free, experience the magic of AI-assisted creation instantly. Let Qritor become your most powerful creative partner.

pricing.title: Pricing

pricing.creditsNote: Qritor usage is measured in Credits.
pricing.taxNote: Prices do not include applicable taxes and duties, including VAT and applicable sales tax.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.q1: What are credits? How do I use them?
faq.a1: Credits are virtual currency used to consume AI services. Each use of AI features (such as smart continuation, plot generation, etc.) consumes a certain amount of credits. Different subscription plans provide different monthly credit quotas.
faq.q2: Can I cancel my subscription at any time?
faq.a2: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. After cancellation, service benefits remain valid until the end of the current billing cycle. No charges will be made for the next billing cycle.
faq.q3: What happens when I run out of credits?
faq.a3: When your credits are exhausted, we will continue to provide service using basic models. You can also upgrade your subscription plan or purchase boost packs to get more credits.
faq.a4: We support WeChat Pay, Alipay, credit cards, and other payment methods. Payments are secured by Stripe.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Qritor (hereinafter referred to as "the Platform" or "we") understands the importance of your personal information. We will protect your personal information in accordance with laws and regulations. Please read and understand this Privacy Policy carefully before using the Platform's services.

companyInfo.title: Data Controller Information
companyInfo.addressValue: 1500 N Grant St Ste R, Denver, CO 80203, USA

section1.title: 1. Information Collection
section1.desc1: During your use of the Platform's services, we may collect the following information:
section1.item1Desc: Email address, nickname, password (encrypted storage) provided during registration;
section1.item3Desc: Order information, payment method (we do not directly store sensitive information such as bank card numbers);
section1.item4Desc: Novels, settings, outlines, and other content you create and save on the Platform.
section1.desc2: When you use the Platform, we automatically collect:
section1.item5Desc: Device model, operating system, browser type, etc.;
section1.item6Desc: Access time, page browsing history, error logs;
section1.item7Desc: Feature usage frequency, credit consumption, etc.

section2.title: 2. Information Use
section2.desc: The information we collect will be used for the following purposes:
section2.item1Desc: To provide you with core services such as creation, storage, and AI-assisted writing;
section2.item2Desc: To verify identity and process account-related requests;
section2.item3Desc: To process subscription payments, credit purchases, and other transactions;
section2.item4Desc: To analyze usage data and optimize product features and user experience;
section2.item5Desc: To detect and prevent security risks and fraudulent activities;
section2.item6Desc: To respond to your inquiries, feedback, and complaints;
section2.item7Desc: Service updates, account security reminders, and other important notifications.

section3.title: 3. Information Sharing
section3.desc: We will not sell your personal information to third parties. However, we may share your information in the following circumstances:
section3.desc1: Share your information with third parties after obtaining your explicit consent.
section3.desc2: We may entrust third-party service providers to handle certain services (such as payment processing, cloud storage). These service providers can only access your information to the extent necessary to provide services and are bound by confidentiality obligations.
section3.desc3: To comply with laws, regulations, court judgments, or mandatory requirements of government agencies, we may disclose your information.
section3.desc4: To protect the rights, property safety of the Platform, users, or the public, we may share information within reasonable limits.

section4.title: 4. Data Security
section4.desc: We take various security measures to protect your information:
section4.item1Desc: Use HTTPS protocol to encrypt data transmission;
section4.item2Desc: User passwords are stored with hash encryption;
section4.item3Desc: Only authorized personnel can access user data;
section4.item4Desc: Regular security audits and vulnerability scanning;
section4.item5Desc: Regular data backups to ensure data recoverability.
section4.note: Although we strive to protect your information security, please understand that there is no absolutely secure transmission method on the Internet. In case of a security incident, we will notify you promptly and take remedial measures.

section5.title: 5. Cookies and Similar Technologies
section5.desc: We use cookies and similar technologies to:
section5.item1: Remember your login status to provide a seamless experience;
section5.item2: Analyze platform usage to improve services;
section5.note: You can manage or delete cookies through your browser settings. However, please note that disabling cookies may affect your normal use of some features of the Platform.

section6.title: 6. Your Rights
section6.desc: According to applicable laws and regulations, you have the following rights:
section6.desc1: You have the right to access personal information we hold about you.
section6.desc2: You can correct inaccurate personal information through account settings or by contacting us.
section6.desc3: In certain circumstances, you have the right to request that we delete your personal information. You can also achieve this by deleting your account. Please note that some information may need to be retained for a certain period due to regulatory requirements.
section6.desc4: For data processing based on consent, you have the right to withdraw consent at any time. Withdrawal of consent does not affect the lawfulness of data processing before withdrawal.
section6.desc5: You have the right to export your creative content in a common format.

section7.title: 7. Children's Privacy Protection
section7.desc1: The Platform primarily provides services to adults. If you are a minor under 14 years old, please use this service with the guidance and supervision of your guardian, and your guardian's consent to this Privacy Policy is required.
section7.desc2: We will not intentionally collect personal information of children. If we discover that we have collected children's information without the consent of a guardian, we will delete the relevant information as soon as possible.

section8.title: 8. Data Storage and Cross-Border Transfer
section8.desc1: Your personal information is stored on servers located in the United States. If you access the Platform from other countries or regions, please note that your information will be transferred to and processed and stored in the United States.
section8.desc2: We will retain your information for the period necessary to provide services to you. When you delete your account or the information is no longer needed, we will delete or anonymize your personal information, unless otherwise required by laws and regulations.

section9.title: 9. Policy Changes
section9.desc1: We may update this Privacy Policy based on business development and changes in laws and regulations. The updated policy will be published on the Platform with the effective date noted.
section9.desc2: In case of significant changes (such as substantial changes in the types of information collected or purposes of use), we will notify you by email or platform notification. If you do not agree with the changed policy, please stop using the Platform's services.

section10.title: 10. Contact Us
section10.desc: If you have any questions, comments, or suggestions about this Privacy Policy, or wish to exercise your data subject rights, you can contact us through the following:
section10.note: We will process and respond to your request as soon as possible after receiving it.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Welcome to Qritor (hereinafter referred to as "the Platform" or "we"). Before using the Platform's services, please read and fully understand the entire contents of these Terms of Service (hereinafter referred to as "these Terms"). Your use of any service of the Platform indicates that you have read, understood, and agreed to be bound by these Terms.

companyInfo.title: Operating Entity Information
companyInfo.addressValue: 1500 N Grant St Ste R, Denver, CO 80203, USA

section1.title: 1. Service Overview
section1.desc: Qritor is an AI-powered creative writing platform that primarily provides the following services:
section1.item1Desc: Uses artificial intelligence technology to assist users in novel creation, including smart continuation, plot generation, dialogue generation, and other features;
section1.item2Desc: Provides structured creation management tools such as character profiles, world-building, plot outlines, etc.;
section1.item3Desc: Supports custom creation processes and automated task execution;
section1.item4Desc: (Coming Soon) Creative tools to transform text content into comic form;
section1.item5Desc: New features and services continuously launched based on business development.

section2.title: 2. User Registration and Accounts
section2.desc1: You must have full civil capacity to register as a user of the Platform. If you are a minor, please read these Terms accompanied by your legal guardian and use the Platform's services only after obtaining your guardian's consent.
section2.desc2: You are responsible for properly maintaining your account information and password security. Any loss caused by your negligence shall be borne by you. If you discover that your account has been stolen or there are other security risks, please contact us immediately.
section2.desc3: You need to provide true and accurate personal information when registering. If the information changes, you should update it promptly. Any consequences arising from providing false information shall be borne by you.

section3.title: 3. User Conduct Guidelines
section3.desc1: When using the Platform's services, you must not:
section3.item1: Publish or disseminate illegal, obscene, violent, terrorist, discriminatory, or hateful content;
section3.item2: Infringe on other people's intellectual property rights, privacy rights, reputation rights, or other legal rights;
section3.item3: Use the Platform for fraud, pyramid schemes, gambling, or other illegal activities;
section3.item4: Interfere with or destroy the normal operation of the Platform or attack the Platform's systems;
section3.item5: Use automated tools to register accounts in bulk or abuse Platform resources;
section3.item6: Maliciously farm credits, reputation, or engage in false transactions;
section3.item7: Other behaviors that violate laws, regulations, or these Terms.
section3.desc2: You are legally responsible for content you create and publish through the Platform. We have the right to delete or block violating content and reserve the right to pursue legal liability.

section4.title: 4. Intellectual Property
section4.desc1: The Platform's name, logo, interface design, software code, technical solutions, etc. are our intellectual property and are protected by law. Without authorization, you may not copy, modify, distribute, or use them in any way.
section4.desc2aText: The intellectual property rights of purely original works you create on the Platform belong to you.
section4.desc2bText: For content generated or assisted by AI features, you have the right to use and profit from it, but must comply with the following provisions:
section4.item1: You may not claim AI-generated content as entirely original work;
section4.item2: If using relevant content for commercial purposes, you must ensure no infringement of third-party rights;
section4.item3: We reserve the right to use anonymized creative data to improve AI models.
section4.desc3: You authorize us to store, process, and transmit your content to the extent necessary to provide services. Content you publish publicly on the Platform is deemed to authorize other users to browse and learn from it.

section5.title: 5. Paid Services
section5.desc1: The Platform offers subscription plans including Free, Pro, and Ultra. The features, benefits, and prices of each plan are subject to the latest announcements on the Platform. After subscribing, the corresponding benefits will take effect immediately.
section5.desc2: Credits are used to consume AI services. You can receive monthly credit quotas through subscription plans or purchase credit packs separately. Credits are non-transferable and non-redeemable for cash. Specific usage rules are subject to Platform descriptions.
section5.desc3: We support payment methods including WeChat Pay, Alipay, and credit cards. Once payment is successful, the order takes effect.
section5.desc4: For detailed refund provisions, please refer to our

section6.title: 6. Service Changes and Termination
section6.desc1: We may adjust or update service content, features, interfaces, etc. based on business development needs. Significant changes will be notified to you in advance through Platform announcements or other means.
section6.desc2: We have the right to suspend or terminate providing services to you in the following circumstances:
section6.item1: You violate these Terms or relevant laws and regulations;
section6.item2: Your account has security risks or abnormal behavior;
section6.item3: Service cannot continue due to force majeure;
section6.desc3: You can request to delete your account. After account deletion, we will delete your personal information within a reasonable period, except as required by laws and regulations. Please ensure there are no unused paid benefits in your account before deletion.

section7.title: 7. Disclaimer
section7.desc1: AI-generated content is based on machine learning algorithms and may be inaccurate, incomplete, or inappropriate. We make no commitments regarding the accuracy, completeness, or suitability of AI-generated content. You need to review and process AI-generated content yourself.
section7.desc2: For service interruptions caused by system maintenance, upgrades, network failures, force majeure, etc., we will try to restore service as soon as possible but are not liable for losses caused thereby.
section7.desc3: The Platform may contain links to third-party websites. The content, privacy policies, etc. of third-party websites are their own responsibility and have nothing to do with us.
section7.desc4: To the maximum extent permitted by law, we are not liable for any indirect, incidental, or punitive damages arising from the use or inability to use the Platform's services.

section8.title: 8. Dispute Resolution
section8.desc1: The conclusion, execution, and interpretation of these Terms shall be governed by the laws of the State of Colorado, United States, without regard to its conflict of law principles.
section8.desc2: Disputes arising from these Terms or the use of the Platform's services shall first be resolved through friendly negotiation. If negotiation fails, either party has the right to file a lawsuit with a court of competent jurisdiction in Denver, Colorado, United States.

section9.title: 9. Terms Modification
section9.desc: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. The modified Terms will be published on the Platform. If you continue to use the Platform's services after the Terms are modified, you are deemed to have accepted the modified Terms. If you do not agree with the modified Terms, please stop using the Platform's services.

section10.title: 10. Contact Us
section10.desc: If you have any questions or suggestions about these Terms, please contact us through the following:

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.intro: Thank you for choosing Qritor. We hope you are satisfied with our services. If you need to request a refund, please read the following refund policy carefully to understand the conditions and process for refunds.

companyInfo.title: Service Provider
companyInfo.addressValue: 1500 N Grant St Ste R, Denver, CO 80203, USA

section1.title: 1. Refund Scope
section1.desc: This refund policy applies to the following paid items:
section1.item2Desc: Various credit packs (Boost Packs) purchased separately.

section2.title: 2. Subscription Refunds
section2.desc1: If you are subscribing to our paid plan for the first time and request a refund within 7 days of purchase, we will process a full refund after review, provided the following conditions are met:
section2.item1: Credits used during the subscription period do not exceed 20% of the monthly quota;
section2.item2: You have not used exclusive premium features (such as AI models available only to Pro/Ultra);
section2.item3: You have not violated the Terms of Service or engaged in abusive behavior.
section2.item4Desc: If you have auto-renewal enabled, you can request a refund within 3 days after the renewal charge (provided no benefits have been used in the new cycle);
section2.item5Desc: After manual renewal, the same refund conditions as first-time subscriptions apply.
section2.desc3: You can cancel your subscription at any time:
section2.item6: After cancellation, service benefits for the current billing cycle remain valid until the end of the cycle;
section2.item7: Simply canceling the subscription (rather than requesting a refund) will not result in any refund;
section2.item8: After cancellation, you will not be charged for the next billing cycle.

section3.title: 3. Credit Pack Refunds
section3.desc1: Within 7 days of purchasing a credit pack, if the following conditions are met, you can request a full refund:
section3.item1: Credits in the pack are completely unused;
section3.item2: Credit pack credits have not been used for any AI generation operations.
section3.desc2: If the credit pack has been partially used:
section3.item3: Usage ratio not exceeding 10%: 80% of the purchase amount can be refunded;
section3.item4: Usage ratio exceeding 10%: No refund will be issued.

section4.title: 4. Non-refundable Situations
section4.desc: The following situations are not eligible for refunds:
section4.item1: Refund requests exceeding the specified refund period;
section4.item2: Subscriptions where service benefits have been heavily used;
section4.item3: Accounts suspended or terminated for violating Terms of Service;
section4.item4: Orders purchased through promotional activities, discount codes, or special prices (unless otherwise stated);
section4.item5: Gifted credits, reward credits, or referral rewards;
section4.item6: Repeated charges due to user's own reasons (such as forgetting to cancel auto-renewal), but you can request to cancel subsequent subscriptions;
section4.item7: Malicious refunds or abuse of the refund policy.

section5.title: 5. Refund Process
section5.desc1: Please submit your refund request through the following:
section5.item2: Email subject should include: [Refund Request] Your registered email
section5.item3: Email content should include: Order number, purchase date, reason for refund
section5.item4Desc: We will complete the review within 3 business days of receiving the request;
section5.item5Desc: After approval, the refund will be returned to your original payment account within 5-10 business days.
section5.note: The actual arrival time may vary depending on the payment channel (WeChat, Alipay, credit card, etc.).
section5.desc3: The refund amount is based on the actual amount paid. If coupons or discounts were used for the order, the refund amount will be the amount paid after deducting the discount.

section6.title: 6. Special Circumstances
section6.desc1: If you are unable to use the service normally due to major platform failures or technical issues, we will compensate or refund based on the actual impact duration. The specific plan will be negotiated with you.
section6.desc2: If you have any objections to the refund result, you can communicate with us via email. We will carefully handle every feedback and seek solutions within reasonable limits.

section7.title: 7. Contact Us
section7.desc: If you have any questions about this refund policy or need to request a refund, please contact us:
section7.addressValue: 1500 N Grant St Ste R, Denver, CO 80203, USA

section8.title: 8. Policy Changes
section8.desc: We reserve the right to modify this refund policy at any time. The modified policy will be published on the Platform with the update date noted. The refund policy applicable when you purchase services is the version effective at the time of purchase.

changelog.heroSubtitle: Explore the latest updates from Qritor, discover innovations and improvements we've brought to you.

v1_2_0.title: Changelog Page Launch & Multiple Experience Improvements

new.item1: Added changelog page to view version update history and feature changes
new.item2: Added changelog entry in portal footer
new.item3: Support timeline display for browsing updates by date

improved.item1: Optimized page loading performance and response speed

new.item1: Desktop app supports user-configurable auto-update settings
new.item2: Added release script to automate version release process

fixed.item1: Fixed IPC handler registration timing issues in some scenarios
fixed.item2: Fixed log file rotation configuration issues
fixed.item3: Fixed API endpoint configuration in development environment

new.item1: AI Writing Assistant: Smart continuation, plot generation, dialogue generation
new.item2: Modular Creation: Character profiles, world-building, plot outlines
new.item3: Workflow Engine: Custom creative processes, automated task execution
new.item4: Multi-platform Support: macOS and Windows desktop apps
new.item5: Multi-language Support: 12 languages including Chinese and English
